title: Shiru's Improvements
description:
A client-side QoL mod for Minecraft 1.21 with Fullbright, Zoom, and a customizable HUD.
Everything is toggleable!
body:
Overview

Shiru's Improvements is a Quality of Life (QoL) mod for Minecraft 1.21 (Fabric). It adds useful features like Fullbright, Zoom, and a customizable HUD, all in one lightweight package. Toggle features via the config screen (Mod Menu recommended).

**Features**


Fullbright: _Brightens dark areas. Toggle with G._

Zoom: _Zoom in to see distant objects. Hold C (adjustable zoom level using scroll)._

HUD _(Top-Left, Toggleable. Every single part of it):_

Coordinates: _Shows XYZ position (e.g., "XYZ: 100, 64, 200")._

Compass: _Displays facing direction (e.g., "Facing: North")._

Clock: _Shows in-game time (e.g., "Time: 06:00")._

Status Effects: _Lists active effects with timers (Basically a letter in a color with information)._

Armor HUD: _Shows equipped armor and durability._

FPS and Ping: _Displays performance stats (e.g., "FPS: 120, Ping: 50ms")._

Durability Warning: _Warns when held item durability is low (a ! above your hotbar. Has a threshold to change when it shows the warning)._


**How to Use**
Install: Requires Fabric API. Mod Menu optional for config. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!
Keybinds: Fullbright (G), Zoom (C). Change in controls settings.
Config: Open via Mod Menu to toggle features and scroll to adjust Zoom level.
HUD: Appears in-game, not in menus. Customize in config.


**Critical Information**
Client-side mod, works in multiplayer (no cheats).
Lightweight, minimal performance impact.

Discord: [https://discord.gg/jXpzxDCwrg](https://discord.gg/jXpzxDCwrg)
